parameters.query:
SELECT
  -- Pipeline by stage
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(estimated_value), 0) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage = 'Identified' AND stage NOT IN ('Won','Lost','No-Bid','Cancelled')) as identified_value,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(estimated_value), 0) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage = 'Qualified' AND stage NOT IN ('Won','Lost','No-Bid','Cancelled')) as qualified_value,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(estimated_value), 0) FROM gda_opportunity_tracker WHERE stage IN ('Pursuing','Proposal','Submitted') AND stage NOT IN ('Won','Lost','No-Bid','Cancelled')) as active_capture_value,
  -- Capture plans
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_capture_plans WHERE plan_data->>'stage' IN ('Proposal','Post-Submittal')) as proposals_in_flight,
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(contract_value), 0) FROM gda_capture_plans WHERE plan_data->>'stage' IN ('Proposal','Post-Submittal')) as proposals_value,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gda_capture_plans WHERE plan_data->>'priority' = 'Must-Win') as must_wins,
  -- Weighted pipeline
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(contract_value * CASE WHEN plan_data->>'stage' = 'Interest' THEN 0.10 WHEN plan_data->>'stage' = 'Pursue' THEN 0.25 WHEN plan_data->>'stage' IN ('Go/No-Go','Qualify') THEN 0.50 WHEN plan_data->>'stage' = 'Proposal' THEN 0.75 WHEN plan_data->>'stage' = 'Post-Submittal' THEN 0.90 ELSE 0.05 END), 0) FROM gda_capture_plans) as weighted_pipeline,
  -- Active contract revenue
  (SELECT COALESCE(SUM((plan_data->>'allocated_revenue_value')::numeric), 0) FROM gda_capture_plans WHERE plan_data->>'allocated_revenue_value' IS NOT NULL) as total_allocated_revenue
